chunks.page_summary: This page provides troubleshooting information regarding USB cable connectivity issues, specifically explaining how 'power-only' USB Mini cables can prevent device detection and how to identify them for use with Rheonics Electronics.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Nothing is happening when I plug in the USB cable!

Modified on: Sun, 15 Feb, 2026 at 12:45 AM

USB Mini cables are notorious for being charge only. Many of the devices that use that type of cable do not need data transfer, so they leave off two of the USB contacts, providing only power and ground. If we connect a only power USB cable, the electronics won't be detected by the device manager from the PC.

1. How do I identify if my USB cable is for power only?

Only 2 pins available at the USB port

Figure 1. Power only USB cable (1)

2. Proper USB cables to be used with Rheonics Electronics
key_facts: USB Mini cables are commonly designed for charge-only purposes, lacking data transfer capabilities.
Power-only USB cables provide only power and ground, omitting two of the USB data contacts.
If a power-only USB cable is used, the connected electronics will not be detected by the PC's device manager.
A power-only USB cable can be identified by observing only 2 pins available at the USB port.
Proper USB cables are required for use with Rheonics Electronics for device detection and functionality.
diagram_labels: Only 2 pins available at the USB port
warnings_notes: If a power-only USB cable is connected, the electronics won't be detected by the device manager from the PC.

chunks.page_summary: This page illustrates the pinout for a standard USB data and power cable, provides notes on Rheonics sensor compatibility and power requirements, and includes external references and a disclaimer.
chunks.extracted_text:
Figure 2. Data+power USB port
(2)

Note:
All Rheonics sensors that have been ordered with an USB port are provided with an USB cable that is fully compatible with our electronics (SME should always operate with a power supply)
